postReview.title: Poland 1-3 Portugal: Silva and Ronaldo on target as visitors stay perfect in Nations League
postReview.description: Portugal made it three wins from three in the Nations League with a comfortable 3-1 victory over Poland at Stadion Gozubuyuk.

preReview.title: Fernandes relishing Portugal challenge with Man Utd 'not in a positive moment'
preReview.description: Bruno Fernandes acknowledged Manchester United's struggles but put them to the back of his mind ahead of Portugal's Nations League fixtures.
